entities.label: Thorin Giantfriend
entities.summary: Dwarf Fighter raised by hill giants who wields the sentient sunblade Dawnbringer and is gradually hardening morally after months in the Underdark.

entities.label: Daz
entities.summary: A houseless drow exile wizard and tactical architect who is the unwitting bait in House T'sarran's operation to identify his anonymous Menzoberranzan patron.

entities.label: Zalthir
entities.summary: A Shadow Monk dragonborn who serves as the party's primary grappler and controller, deeply bonded with Daz and serving as Glabbagool's informal mentor.

entities.label: Grygum
entities.summary: A half-orc cleric of Bahamut with a heterodox theology believing dragons choose alignment freely, now sought after by Candlekeep scholars.

entities.label: The Ember Vanguard
entities.summary: The player character party operating under this cover name, heroes of Blingdenstone and wanted criminals in Gracklstugh.

entities.label: Glabbagool
entities.summary: A formerly mindless gelatinous cube that gained sentience, now traveling as a grey ooze in the party's bag of holding and guarding the captured T'sarran spy.

entities.label: Eldeth
entities.summary: A shield dwarf companion who departed westward to Mithril Hall, swearing an oath to advocate for Thorin's clan adoption after briefing dwarven lords about demon lord activity.

entities.label: Spiderbait
entities.summary: A goblin former guide through the Silken Paths who is now at Candlekeep seeking surface-world employment.

entities.label: Asha Vandree
entities.summary: A deceased drow cleric who allied with the party to kill Ilvara Mizzrym, then attempted to seize command and was killed by Zalthir.

entities.label: Nym Duskryn
entities.summary: A drow mercenary who fulfilled a contract to protect Daz from Houses Mizzrym and T'sarran but does not know the identity of the anonymous patron who hired her.

entities.label: Kaelira (Duskryn)
entities.summary: Nym Duskryn's sister and professional partner who also fulfilled the protection contract for Daz and departed with slightly warmer regard for him.

entities.label: Jorlan Duskryn
entities.summary: A scarred drow warrior and estranged sibling of the Duskryn sisters whose primary motivation was revenge against Ilvara Mizzrym, now of unknown status after the final battle.

entities.label: Ilvara Mizzrym
entities.summary: The deceased drow High Priestess of Lolth who commanded Velkynvelve, secretly corrupted by Zuggtmoy, and killed by Grygum's Guiding Bolt in the final confrontation.

entities.label: JimJar
entities.summary: A deep gnome companion revealed to possess celestial immunities who vanished with a wink from Blingdenstone, leaving behind an inert bone die and unresolved questions about his true nature.

entities.label: Stool
entities.summary: A myconid sprout companion safely evacuated from Neverlight Grove who departed with Basidia and Rusharoo into the Underdark.

entities.label: Rump-a-dump
entities.summary: A myconid companion who was recovered uninfected and evacuated from Neverlight Grove with Basidia's group.

entities.label: Shuushar
entities.summary: A kuo-toa monk pacifist who left the party to lead kuo-toa refugees in building a new society free from god-creation madness.

entities.label: Fuurm "Copper" Coppernose
entities.summary: Human surface-dweller rescued from a Faerzress crystal cave who is searching for his lost sister and is currently traveling with the party.

entities.label: Baedora
entities.summary: Human surface-dweller rescued alongside Fuurm Coppernose from a Faerzress crystal cave and currently traveling with the party.

entities.label: Fargas Rumblefoot
entities.summary: A halfling rescued from the Silken Paths who shared knowledge of the Lost Tomb of Khaem's location and traps as payment.

entities.label: Zuggtmoy
entities.summary: The Demon Queen of Fungi, physically present in the Underdark at Neverlight Grove, pursuing a wedding ritual with Araumycos to gain world-spanning decay power.

entities.label: Juiblex
entities.summary: The demon lord of slimes who was expelled from Blingdenstone but declared intent to be reborn by consuming Zuggtmoy's wedding banquet.

entities.label: Demogorgon
entities.summary: A two-headed demon lord confirmed loose in the Underdark after being summoned at Sloobludop, where he destroyed the kuo-toa settlement.

entities.label: Araumycos
entities.summary: A world-spanning fungal network that Zuggtmoy intends to wed in a ritual that would give her untold power over decay and death.

entities.label: Phylo
entities.summary: A myconid sovereign at Neverlight Grove who is fully corrupted by Zuggtmoy and running Grove operations in her name.

entities.label: Basidia
entities.summary: A myconid sovereign who resisted Zuggtmoy's corruption, evacuated Neverlight Grove with loyal myconids, and is now traveling in the Underdark with Rusharoo and Loobamub.

entities.label: Sarith
entities.summary: A deceased drow companion whose demonic spore infection reached terminal stage at Neverlight Grove, causing his head to explode and transforming him into a spore servant killed by Jimjar.

entities.label: Buppido
entities.summary: A deceased derro serial killer who believed himself divinely chosen, murdered Yuk Yuk, and was killed by Daz's magic missiles in the Whorlstone Tunnels.

entities.label: Derendil
entities.summary: A quaggoth who believed himself a polymorphed elf prince and was killed by Imbros during the Velkynvelve prison break.

entities.label: Ront
entities.summary: An orc companion who refused to flee and was killed by a vrock during the Velkynvelve escape.

entities.label: Hgraam
entities.summary: An elder stone giant at Cairngorm Cavern who gifted the party the Stonespeaker Crystal and a cryptic prophecy before sealing his cavern.

entities.label: Dorhun
entities.summary: A stone giant in Gracklstugh who invited the party to Cairngorm Cavern after the rampaging two-headed giant encounter.

entities.label: Gartokkar Xundorn
entities.summary: The Keeper of the Flame in Gracklstugh who received the demonic dragon egg believing it was a legitimate replacement for Themberchaud and does not know it contains a demon.

entities.label: Errde Blackskull
entities.summary: The Stone Guard captain at Overlake Hold in Gracklstugh who hired the party and likely informed drow of their passage.

entities.label: Themberchaud
entities.summary: The obese red dragon Wyrmsmith of Gracklstugh who falsely believes the party are his agents and is unaware the dragon egg he received is a corrupted demonic artifact.

entities.label: Werz Saltbaron
entities.summary: A Gracklstugh merchant the party saved from assassination who paid a 1,100gp NDA fee and committed to facilitating a gnome weapons deal.

entities.label: Dorbo Diggermattock
entities.summary: The chief of Blingdenstone's mining faction who is reopening the city for surface trade but shows signs of residual Juiblex-linked greed and aggression.

entities.label: Senni Diggermattock
entities.summary: Dorbo's more pragmatic partner in leading Blingdenstone, focused on stabilizing the civilian population and wererat integration.

entities.label: Chipgrin
entities.summary: The leader of the Gold Whisker wererats who control Blingdenstone's upper boroughs and gave Daz the Voucher of the Varmint.

entities.label: Jadgar
entities.summary: A ghost Burrow Warden at Blingdenstone's Temple of the Ruby in the Rough who is covertly training next-generation wardens and has two unused boons owed to the party.

entities.label: Kazook Pickshine
entities.summary: A deep gnome artificer in Blingdenstone who can convert empty spell gems into items of great magical power.

entities.label: Pudding King
entities.summary: A defeated sentient telepathic ooze who ruled an ooze court in Blingdenstone and served as Zuggtmoy's primary Blingdenstone ally.

entities.label: Eldgrim
entities.summary: A leader of the Empty Scabbard Killers assassin group in Gracklstugh who made a deal with the party to eliminate the Demogorgon cult.

entities.label: Ploopploopeen
entities.summary: A kuo-toa archpriest of the Sea Mother whose betrayal of his daughter Bloppblippodd completed the ritual summoning Demogorgon; presumed dead after Sloobludop's destruction.

entities.label: Bloppblippodd (Blopp)
entities.summary: A deceased kuo-toa archpriest of the Deep Father who was killed by her father Ploopploopeen, completing the ritual that summoned Demogorgon from the Darklake.

entities.label: Brysis of Khaem
entities.summary: A Netherese wraith destroyed in the true burial chamber of the Lost Tomb of Khaem, guarding Dawnbringer.

entities.label: Narrak
entities.summary: A deceased derro savant and Demogorgon cultist whose ritual to curse stone giants with two-headedness was stopped when Thorin killed him.

entities.label: Plinki
entities.summary: Derro cultist who attempted to corrupt a stolen dragon egg into a two-headed demonic wyrmling and was killed by Zalthir's fire breath.

entities.label: Xinaya
entities.summary: A drow scout sent by Ilvara Mizzrym who was found fungally corrupted in the Garden of Welcome and mercy-killed by Thorin with Dawnbringer.

entities.label: Yestabrod
entities.summary: The deceased leader of Neverlight Grove's Circle of Masters who was killed by Zalthir and later puppeteered as a mock wedding priest for Zuggtmoy's rehearsal.

entities.label: Yuk-Yuk
entities.summary: A goblin guide through the Silken Paths who was murdered by Buppido during the party's journey.

entities.label: Dawnbringer
entities.summary: A sentient sunblade carried by Thorin that deals double radiant damage against fungi and undead and has strong opinions about its purpose.

entities.label: The Garden Shadow
entities.summary: Ancient monk who trained Zalthir and whose teachings about discipline left a lasting philosophical impression on him.

entities.label: Hemeth
entities.summary: A duergar arms dealer last seen heading toward Gracklstugh who told the party to find him there if they escaped alive.

entities.label: Welnaste Mizzrym
entities.summary: Drow caravan leader of House Mizzrym who originally sold the party to Ilvara Mizzrym and departed Velkynvelve before the escape.

entities.label: The Matron Mother of House T'sarran
entities.summary: An unnamed drow matron who has ruled House T'sarran for 200 years and is using Daz as bait to identify his anonymous patron.

entities.label: House Mizzrym
entities.summary: A drow house whose high priestess Ilvara Mizzrym was killed by the party; the house is sending escalating unanswered correspondence and does not yet know she is dead.

entities.label: House T'sarran
entities.summary: A 200-year-old Menzoberranzan drow house whose matron is using Daz as bait to identify his anonymous patron and has deployed multiple surface agents against the party.

entities.label: House Duskryn
entities.summary: The drow house of the Duskryn mercenary sisters who fulfilled a contract to protect Daz from Houses Mizzrym and T'sarran.

entities.label: Cult of Lolth
entities.summary: Dominant religious-political force organizing drow society around noble houses in Menzoberranzan, of which Asha Vandree is a genuine devotee.

entities.label: Keepers of the Flame
entities.summary: Gracklstugh's religious organization overseeing Themberchaud, now in possession of a demonic dragon egg that Gartokkar Xundorn believes is a legitimate replacement dragon.

entities.label: Stone Guards
entities.summary: Duergar city guard of Gracklstugh led by Errde Blackskull who are investigating corruption in the Council of Savants.

entities.label: Empty Scabbard / Soulblades
entities.summary: Assassin guild in Gracklstugh led by Eldgrim that was contracted by the Deepking and struck a deal with the party to cancel Werz Saltbaron's kill order.

entities.label: Grey Ghosts
entities.summary: Thieves' guild in Gracklstugh subordinate to the Demogorgon cult that stole the dragon egg and issued a vendetta against the party.

entities.label: Council of Savants
entities.summary: Gracklstugh's derro governing body that was heavily infiltrated by the Demogorgon cult using 'Y' carvings to indoctrinate members.

entities.label: Diggermattock Leadership
entities.summary: Governing leadership of Blingdenstone under Dorbo and Senni Diggermattock who are reopening the city for surface trade and agreed to help the party reach the surface.

entities.label: Gold Whisker Clan
entities.summary: Wererat gnome clan in Blingdenstone led by Chipgrin who allied against the oozes and now formally control the upper boroughs as a defense force.

entities.label: Borough Wardens
entities.summary: Ghost organization of Blingdenstone defenders being reconstituted by the ghost Jadgar through training young gnomes.

entities.label: Zuggtmoy's Network
entities.summary: The web of corrupted agents and myconid servants through which Zuggtmoy advances her wedding plan and fungal colonization of the Underdark.

entities.label: Velkynvelve
entities.summary: The destroyed drow outpost where the party was originally imprisoned, now cleared with Ilvara Mizzrym dead and the Heart Fungus destroyed.

entities.label: Gracklstugh
entities.summary: A duergar city-state in the Underdark experiencing political instability, mass executions, and wanted posters for the Ember Vanguard.

entities.label: Sloobludop
entities.summary: A destroyed kuo-toa settlement on the Darklake shore where Demogorgon was summoned and rose to destroy the town.

entities.label: Neverlight Grove
entities.summary: A myconid settlement now largely under Zuggtmoy's control via Phylo, where the demon queen is preparing her wedding ritual with Araumycos.

entities.label: Blingdenstone
entities.summary: A deep gnome settlement saved from an ooze incursion by the party, now celebrating them as legendary heroes and reopening for surface trade.

entities.label: The Darklake
entities.summary: Vast underground water network connecting major Underdark settlements that the party navigated by boat between Sloobludop, Gracklstugh, and beyond.

entities.label: The Silken Paths
entities.summary: Giant spider web network spanning a massive chasm that the party traversed with goblin guides Yuk-Yuk and Spiderbait.

entities.label: Lost Tomb of Khaem
entities.summary: A Netherese tomb fully cleared by the party where Dawnbringer was recovered after defeating the wraith Brysis of Khaem.

entities.label: Whorlstone Tunnels
entities.summary: A network of tunnels beneath Gracklstugh where Buppido's shrine, Narrak's ritual, the Demogorgon cult obelisk, and the Gray Ghost conspiracy were all discovered and cleared.

entities.label: Cairngorm Cavern
entities.summary: The sealed home of the stone giant elder Hgraam near Gracklstugh, now closed after the party's second audience.

entities.label: Menzoberranzan
entities.summary: The drow city where Daz originated, where his anonymous patron and House T'sarran are both based, and where House Mizzrym is headquartered.

entities.label: The Surface ("The Overbright")
entities.summary: The surface world that is the party's ultimate destination, accessible via a confirmed route through Blingdenstone.

entities.label: Escape to the Surface
entities.summary: The party's primary goal of reaching the surface world via the confirmed route through Blingdenstone with the Diggermattocks' assistance.

entities.label: Zuggtmoy's Fungal Colonization of Blingdenstone
entities.summary: Zuggtmoy is filling the power vacuum left by Juiblex's expulsion, visibly colonizing Blingdenstone with accelerating fungal growth right now.

entities.label: House T'sarran Retaliation Arc
entities.summary: A surviving House T'sarran warrior is en route to inform the Matron Mother of the kill team's destruction, after which a formal kill order against the party is expected.

entities.label: Juiblex's Declared Intent to Consume Zuggtmoy
entities.summary: Juiblex survived expulsion from Blingdenstone and announced intent to consume Zuggtmoy's fungal banquet, setting a course for a demon-on-demon catastrophe.

entities.label: The Araumycos Wedding
entities.summary: Zuggtmoy's central objective to wed Araumycos and spread her spores across the entire Underdark and surface is ongoing with no action yet taken to stop it.

entities.label: Daz's False Identity with Asha Vandree
entities.summary: Daz's load-bearing deception as a Lolth convert with Asha Vandree is at risk from the sustained proximity of drow strangers (Nym, Kaelira, Asha) operating inside drow social ritual.

entities.label: Jorlan Duskryn — Estranged Duskryn Sibling
entities.summary: Jorlan Duskryn is the estranged brother of Nym and Kaelira Duskryn and Ilvara's former lover; he is alive and in transit. The party may have misheard Nym's 'Can I kill your brother?' line (addressed to Kaelira about Jorlan) as referring to Daz; the misunderstanding is theirs to discover.

entities.label: Glabbagool's Ooze Communion / Body Swap
entities.summary: Glabbagool's demonstrated mass-ooze telepathy and mysterious body swap with the Pudding King have unknown lasting metaphysical consequences.

entities.label: Empty Spell Gems / Kazook Pickshine
entities.summary: The party holds unprocessed empty spell gems including a fourth-level gem that Kazook Pickshine in Blingdenstone can convert into powerful magical items before their surface departure.

entities.label: Zalthir's Name List
entities.summary: Zalthir carries an uninvestigated list of names found at Velkynvelve believed to identify people who owe favors, which may prove valuable on the surface.

entities.label: Jadgar's Two Boons
entities.summary: The party has two unclaimed truthful answers from the ghost Jadgar, which could reveal the identity of the Matron Mother of House T'sarran or the status of Zuggtmoy's wedding.

entities.label: Drow Extraction Contract
entities.summary: Nym Duskryn and Kaelira Duskryn hold an active extract-alive contract on Daz, placed through cutouts; the mercs do not know the principal and do not know who Daz is. The contract creates ongoing friction within the party's traveling group.

entities.label: Zuggtmoy Expansion Score
entities.summary: Tracks how close Zuggtmoy is to completing her wedding to Araumycos and colonizing Blingdenstone; currently Elevated with Critical as the next threshold.

entities.label: Juiblex Resurgence Score
entities.summary: An ELEVATED threat score tracking Juiblex's declared plan to consume Zuggtmoy's banquet as his rebirth mechanism.

entities.label: House T'sarran Retaliation Score
entities.summary: An ELEVATED threat score tracking House T'sarran's escalating response to the party's kills, with the matron mother now fully briefed.

entities.label: Daz Identity Exposure Score
entities.summary: Tracks the fragility of Daz's false Lolth-follower identity with Asha Vandree; currently Fragile with Collapse as the next threshold.

entities.label: Drow Extraction Contract Score
entities.summary: Tracks pressure from the Duskryn sisters' extraction contract on Daz; currently Active with Forced Extraction as the next threshold.

entities.label: Thorin
entities.summary: A dwarf fighter raised by hill giants, wielder of the sentient sunblade Dawnbringer, and honorary member of the Diggermattock Miners.

entities.label: Daz's Anonymous Patron
entities.summary: An unknown entity based in or routing through Menzoberranzan who paid substantial resources through cutouts to protect Daz from Houses Mizzrym and T'sarran.

entities.label: House T'sarran Spy
entities.summary: An unnamed captured drow spy currently miniaturized in the party's bag of holding at Candlekeep under Glabbagool's watch.

entities.label: Droki
entities.summary: A hostile derro courier in Gracklstugh whose delivery routes exposed the underlying Whorlstone Tunnels conspiracy.

entities.label: Topsy
entities.summary: A deep gnome companion who was separated from the party during their stay in Gracklstugh, current whereabouts unknown.

entities.label: Turvy
entities.summary: A deep gnome companion paired with Topsy who was also separated from the party during the Gracklstugh stay, current whereabouts unknown.

entities.label: Pelek
entities.summary: A deep gnome ghost murdered by Buppido whose remains were carried to Blingdenstone by Grygum and interred at the Temple of the Ruby in the Rough.

entities.label: Prince Livid
entities.summary: A member of the Pudding King's ooze court who was killed during the Battle of Blingdenstone.

entities.label: Princess Ebonmire
entities.summary: A deceased member of the Pudding King's ooze court whose recovered spellbook was donated to Candlekeep for party entry.

entities.label: Rusharoo
entities.summary: A myconid who guided the party out of Neverlight Grove and later evacuated with Basidia's loyal myconid group into the Underdark.

entities.label: Loobamub
entities.summary: A myconid member of the Circle of Explorers who evacuated Neverlight Grove with Basidia and Rusharoo.

entities.label: Glyphic Shroomlight
entities.summary: A deep gnome based at Blingdenstone's Temple of the Ruby in the Rough who is friendly toward the party.

entities.label: Grogluk
entities.summary: A Gracklstugh gate guard who accepted a bribe and a Stone Guard salute when the party departed the city.

entities.label: Voosbur
entities.summary: A myconid associated with infected dancing myconids near Gracklstugh who disappeared into cavern moss after the party's encounter.

entities.label: Vareth
entities.summary: A Candlekeep avowed scholar assigned to interview Grygum about his Bahamut conversion and whose niche field expanded after Stroud defeated Protanther at chess.

entities.label: Philemon
entities.summary: A Candlekeep avowed scholar specializing in sentient artifact interpersonal conflict, assigned to counsel Thorin and Dawnbringer.

entities.label: Khell-Vire
entities.summary: A Candlekeep avowed scholar with an existing specific interest relevant to the Jimjar inquiry, assigned to Zalthir's research question.

entities.label: Gorg'Bahamut
entities.summary: Grygum's mentor who trained him in the heterodox Bahamut sub-sect that believes dragons choose alignment freely.

entities.label: Shal
entities.summary: A mysterious advisor to Gracklstugh's Deepking of unknown identity whose arrival correlated with the Deepking becoming paranoid and refusing counsel.

entities.label: King Hekaton
entities.summary: The giant king whose post-War of the Giants decree established peaceful relations that Thorin's giant upbringing traces to.

entities.label: Valimor Brightgem
entities.summary: A Blingdenstone craftsperson who commissioned the Vaultmaster Locking Scabbard for Thorin and Dawnbringer.

entities.label: Ember Vanguard
entities.summary: The party's self-chosen group name that has grown into a feared Underdark legend far beyond the party's control, appearing on wanted posters in Gracklstugh.

entities.label: Zuggtmoy's Cult
entities.summary: The corrupted myconid faction at Neverlight Grove preparing Zuggtmoy's wedding ritual with Araumycos, led by the corrupted Sovereign Phylo.

entities.label: Blingdenstone Coalition
entities.summary: The alliance of Diggermattock miners, Gold Whisker wererats, and Burrow Wardens that now governs Blingdenstone and is reopening it for surface trade.

entities.label: Gold Whisker Wererats
entities.summary: Chipgrin's wererat faction that negotiated control of Blingdenstone's upper boroughs as a self-funded defense force.

entities.label: Stone Guard
entities.summary: Gracklstugh's city guard led by Errde Blackskull, suffering from internal corruption correlated with the Deepking's deteriorating paranoia.

entities.label: Empty Scabbard Killers
entities.summary: An assassin organization in Gracklstugh led by Eldgrim that struck a deal with the party to eliminate the Demogorgon cult.

entities.label: Gray Ghosts
entities.summary: A Gracklstugh criminal faction that stole the replacement dragon egg for Themberchaud and had connections to the corrupted Council of Savants.

entities.label: Lords' Alliance
entities.summary: The surface-world political coalition that the party has an obligation to warn about demon lords active in the Underdark.

entities.label: The Avowed (Candlekeep)
entities.summary: The scholarly monastic order running Candlekeep who received the party's five donated books and are conducting research on their behalf.

entities.label: Circle of Explorers
entities.summary: Basidia's loyal myconid faction that evacuated Neverlight Grove and is now traveling in the Underdark with Rusharoo and Loobamub.

entities.label: Candlekeep
entities.summary: The world's most famous library where the party is currently recovering, conducting research, and housing a captured House T'sarran spy in their bag of holding.

entities.label: Darklake
entities.summary: A vast underground waterway used by the party for transit, where Demogorgon was last seen and demonic creatures have been encountered.

entities.label: Yggmorgus
entities.summary: The vast central mushroom tower at Neverlight Grove serving as Zuggtmoy's seat of power where the wedding rehearsal is being conducted.

entities.label: Silken Paths
entities.summary: A spider web chasm traversed by the party with goblin guides Yuk-Yuk and Spiderbait, where a spectator was defeated and a mimic avoided.

entities.label: Mithril Hall
entities.summary: A dwarven stronghold on the surface where Eldeth is traveling to brief lords about Underdark demon lord activity and advocate for Thorin's clan adoption.

entities.label: Underdark
entities.summary: The vast subterranean world beneath the surface where demon lords are confirmed to be loose and the main events of the campaign took place.

entities.label: Fungal Cavern
entities.summary: The cavern near Blingdenstone where the final confrontation with Ilvara Mizzrym took place, ending the drow pursuit permanently.

entities.label: Temple of the Ruby in the Rough
entities.summary: A sacred site in Blingdenstone where Pelek's remains were interred and where Jadgar's ghost resides, holding two unclaimed boons for the party.

entities.label: Oozing Temple
entities.summary: A flooded underground dungeon complex cleared by the party where Glabbagool was recruited.

entities.label: Demon Lords Loose in the Underdark
entities.summary: The central campaign crisis: multiple demon lords including Demogorgon, Zuggtmoy, and Juiblex are physically present in the Prime Material Plane, with an unknown summoner yet to be identified.

entities.label: Daz's Unknown Patron
entities.summary: An anonymous Menzoberranzan entity paid substantial resources to protect Daz from Houses Mizzrym and T'sarran, and House T'sarran is using Daz as bait to identify them.

entities.label: House T'sarran Vendetta
entities.summary: House T'sarran's ongoing operation to identify Daz's patron using him as bait, with a captured spy at Candlekeep and more agents expected.

entities.label: Zuggtmoy's Wedding
entities.summary: Zuggtmoy's ritual plan to wed Araumycos, currently at rehearsal stage in Neverlight Grove, which if completed would grant her world-spanning decay power.

entities.label: Warn Surface World About Demon Lords
entities.summary: The party's active obligation to warn the Lords' Alliance and surface powers about demon lords loose in the Underdark, as yet unfulfilled.

entities.label: Jimjar's True Identity
entities.summary: The unresolved mystery of Jimjar's celestial or divine nature, being researched at Candlekeep by Zalthir through the scholar Khell-Vire.

entities.label: House Mizzrym's Response
entities.summary: The latent threat of House Mizzrym investigating Ilvara Mizzrym's silence and eventually discovering the party killed their high priestess.

entities.label: Gartokkar's Demon Egg Crisis
entities.summary: A deferred crisis in Gracklstugh where Gartokkar Xundorn unknowingly holds a demon-possessed dragon egg that will cause catastrophe when it acts.

entities.label: Candlekeep Research Period
entities.summary: The party's current recovery phase allocating five research questions among Candlekeep scholars across threads including patron identity, Jimjar, Dawnbringer therapy, and Grygum's theology.

entities.label: Thorin's Identity Crisis
entities.summary: Thorin's quiet internal struggle with how Underdark trauma has changed him, including consideration of the Zhentarim Tactics fighting style representing a whole character shift.

entities.label: Juiblex's Threatened Rebirth
entities.summary: Juiblex's declared plan to be reborn by consuming Zuggtmoy's wedding banquet, creating a collision-course wildcard between the two demonic threats.

entities.label: Necromantic Pearl Mystery
entities.summary: An unidentified smooth fist-sized pearl extracted from Velkynvelve's fungal mass with a sensation of wrongness whose origin and purpose are entirely unknown.

entities.label: Faerzress Distortion
entities.summary: A tracking score for Underdark-wide Faerzress anomalies including the blink event correlated with demon lord summoning, rated HIGH with documented fluctuations.

entities.label: Zuggtmoy's Ascension Score
entities.summary: A CRITICAL threat score tracking progress toward Zuggtmoy's wedding ritual completion with Araumycos, currently at rehearsal stage.

entities.label: Zuggtmoy's Expansion Score
entities.summary: A HIGH threat score tracking Zuggtmoy's opportunistic fungal expansion into Blingdenstone following Juiblex's expulsion.

entities.label: Demonic Incursion Score
entities.summary: A CRITICAL threat score tracking the general demon lord crisis with Demogorgon confirmed in the Underdark and Zuggtmoy manifesting.

entities.label: Gracklstugh Instability Score
entities.summary: An ELEVATED threat score tracking Gracklstugh's political crisis including the Ember Vanguard wanted status, the demon egg, and Shal's influence on the Deepking.
